-- 1 of 5 --

The Business Launch Formula Part 3
!
This is next example is actually my example, back when I started my first online
business.
!
This is where I was teaching people about the stock market. I had no credentials what
so ever. I wasn’t a stock broker, registered investment advisor or anything like that. I
was just someone who had a passion for the stock market and spent a lot of time
studying it.
!
I started a newsletter about the stock market. That first newsletter went out to about
19 people. I mentioned that to you earlier. It was actually 17 people. It was 19 email
addresses. One was my second email address and one was my wife’s email address, so
it was 19.
!
Here’s that list. This is just like John started, except he had that 1,800 people. I had 19
people. That list that started there with 19 eventually grew into 80,000 people. It’s sort
of ironic. That’s the number John’s at right now. I’m sure he’s going bigger, but I got to
about 80,000.
!
How do you go from 19 people to 80,000 people? Very simple. I really focused on
getting people to opt in. That was like the number one metric in my sight was how
many people I got to opt in every day. I had a graph and I graphed every single day
how many people I got to opt in.
!
It started off with every few days I would get one. Then it got up to the point where I
would get one every day, then three or four every day. Eventually I was getting 30 to
35 people per day. That’s like 1,000 people a month. That’s 12,000 people a year. I did
that for seven or eight years. Do the math and you end up with around 80,000.
!
Of course you get some unsubscribes along the way, but every now and then I would
do some promotions and stuff. I ended up just over 80,000 people. All along I kept on
testing and tweaking the process, working on getting people to opt in.
!
In any case, this is this list. The thing about this list was (I’m going to do a little
modification right here) it wasn’t just a list it was a list of investors. I don’t know if they
were investors. They were people interested in investing. They were interested in the
stock market from an investing stand point.
!
Copyright © All Rights Reserved Internet Alchemy, Inc. 2014 -2015 	Page ! 2
PLF_Module1v1.0
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 2 of 5 --

For those of you who don’t know much about the stock market, there’s investors and
there’s also traders. Traders are interested in the market as well, but investors usually
have a longer time frame. Investors that are in and out of the market. Investors go in
the market and stay in the market.
!
There’s this other universe. It’s similar, both interested in the stock market, but these
folks are more intensely interested and more short-term, in and out of the market. I
had an interest in both of these areas. I had knowledge about both of these areas.
I started this list, and after I got that list, I think it was around 1,600 people after four,
five or six months.
!
At that point I actually had someone who was a mentor. That mentor was a trader, and
he said, “Hey Jeff, you’ve got some success here. You’re building up some success with
publishing.” I’ve got to mention, first of all these are free. This is a free newsletter. I
wasn’t charging anything, I was just building this list hoping someday I would make
some money from it really.
!
My mentor said to me, “Let’s partner up and create a product for traders.” That’s what
we did. This was that first launch that did $1650. What I did was I created a little mini
launch. This was that very first launch.
!
What I did was I created a launch list. I didn’t call it a launch list at the time. I didn’t
know what a launch list was, no one did frankly. I created a second list. I invited people
to join this list, gave them a bunch of free content for about a month, then I made this
off for this product.
!
We did this $1650 and we were off to the races and kept on building from there. We did
launch after launch after launch. That’s where I did the $6000, then we did the $8000
and we kept on getting better. Eventually we did a $17,000 launch, but we kept on
getting better, doing about two to three launches a year.
!
Basically, I tool this investing list. Then I rolled off a launch list and then I sold people
into this trading list. We kept on doing these occasional launches. We kept this for sale
every day of the year, but two to three times a year we put together a sale, a
promotion.
!
We would offer a discount. We would offer a bonus with an extra report, extra
subscription time and we would create a launch, and do a promotion for that and do
another launch.
!
Copyright © All Rights Reserved Internet Alchemy, Inc. 2014 -2015 	Page ! 3
PLF_Module2v1.0
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 3 of 5 --

Then I’m thought, “Okay, well this is going along pretty good.” Then I found the middle
ground. What I learned in publishing to both of these groups is that there was this
middle group. They were people that traded more often than the investors, but they
traded less often than the full-out traders. These are sort of long-term traders or short-
term investors so to speak.
!
I found out that this big group was out there. I found that out because these people
would always write back to me what they wanted. What we did was we created another
launch list. We created this product, created another launch list. Didn’t create a
product, actually created a launch for it, sent people from the investors list and sent
people from the traders list into this launch list.
!
It’s a little more complicated because actually this traders list, we had a prospect list
and a buyers list, so we sent all three of those universes into the launch list for this one,
and then we launched this thing. That launch was that $106,000 launch.
!
That was the first launch I did that did over six figures. That was a great launch,
beautiful launch, it was incredible. It was all profit. We had no partners. We had no
costs. We hadn’t created the product yet. The product was actually, they were going to
get a daily email from us telling them what we thought was going to happen the next
day in the stock market.
!
Literally there was no cost. We were going to send them for a year’s subscription one
email a day, so we were going to send them 250 short emails that said, “We think the
market is going up, or it’s going down.” Literally, no costs to fulfill. There’s no JVs,
nothing, just $106,000. After merchant expenses we ended up with $102,000 or
$103,000.
!
That was completely awesome. The thing is we just responded to the market demand.
These people said, “Hey, we know that you’re doing this short-term trading stuff, but
I’m not a short-term trader. I’m a day trader. How can I use all of your wisdom?”
!
These folks said, “Well, you know that day trading stuff is really cool, but I’ve got a job.
I can’t do that. I need something a little longer term. I’d like to trade on a daily basis.”
We just responded to that market demand, made up this offer, put people on a launch
list and ran them through the sequence. Now we’re starting to talk about some real
money. Right?
!
You know what? It didn’t end there, of course it doesn’t. Just like John Gallagher, you’re
going to come up with more ideas. So then we came up with this idea for webinars. We
Copyright © All Rights Reserved Internet Alchemy, Inc. 2014 -2015 	Page ! 4
PLF_Module1v1.0
GROUPINSIDERS.COM EXCLUSIVE

-- 4 of 5 --

did these paid webinars. We would sit there and watch the market, and make
comments throughout the day. People would pay us $200 to $300 to watch our
comments for a day a two, just to learn from us.
!
What did we do then? We created another launch list. We just fed people from each
one of these into this launch list and then we sold the webinar. It didn’t end there. I
think we were doing, let’s just say, $30,000. It was at least $30,000. It might have been
more. We would do these a few times a year.
!
Then there was the home study course. What did we do? We did another one. We just
drove everyone into the home study course. We rolled that out. The first time we rolled
that out, that thing did $110,000. Again, that was no partners, no affiliates. We did
have some costs which were shipping out books and DVDs and CDs.
!
Each one of these, we just responded to what the market was telling us. We were
building up a product portfolio. That’s the Business Launch Formula. You’re doing these
launches. You’re creating great products. You’re doing great products because you’re
doing what the market is asking you for. You’re doing it in a very interactive fashion.
!
You’re building list relationship all the way along. You’re just doing what the market tells
you, and next thing you know you turn around and you’ve got a whole bunch of
products and you’re on a roll.
